prompt: Create a romantic academic oil-painting portrait in the style of William-Adolphe Bouguereau with a subtle modern twist: a young woman with long wavy pastel pink hair sits sideways on a mossy rock beside a shallow woodland stream, her bare feet touching the water. She wears a translucent cream and blush-pink Greco-Roman chiffon dress with a rope belt, delicate and softly draped over one shoulder, with classical folds and luminous fabric. Add black rectangular eyeglasses and a crown of small pink wildflowers and green leaves to contrast contemporary intellect with mythic nymph beauty. Her pose is three-quarter back view, seated with one knee raised, one hand resting on the rock behind her, the other hand relaxed near her leg, turning her head over her shoulder to look toward the viewer with a calm, slightly wistful expression. Place her in an enchanted forest clearing with exactly one stream, one moss-covered boulder seat, dense dark green foliage on both sides, small pink wildflowers near the water, and warm golden sunlight filtering through trees in the background. Use soft realism, idealized skin, fine painterly brushwork, glowing rim light on hair and shoulders, atmospheric haze, muted earth tones, dusky greens, rose pink accents, and an old-master varnished texture. Vertical portrait composition, intimate full-body framing, elegant anatomy, serene classical mood, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
promptEn: Create a romantic academic oil-painting portrait in the style of William-Adolphe Bouguereau with a subtle modern twist: a young woman with long wavy pastel pink hair sits sideways on a mossy rock beside a shallow woodland stream, her bare feet touching the water. She wears a translucent cream and blush-pink Greco-Roman chiffon dress with a rope belt, delicate and softly draped over one shoulder, with classical folds and luminous fabric. Add black rectangular eyeglasses and a crown of small pink wildflowers and green leaves to contrast contemporary intellect with mythic nymph beauty. Her pose is three-quarter back view, seated with one knee raised, one hand resting on the rock behind her, the other hand relaxed near her leg, turning her head over her shoulder to look toward the viewer with a calm, slightly wistful expression. Place her in an enchanted forest clearing with exactly one stream, one moss-covered boulder seat, dense dark green foliage on both sides, small pink wildflowers near the water, and warm golden sunlight filtering through trees in the background. Use soft realism, idealized skin, fine painterly brushwork, glowing rim light on hair and shoulders, atmospheric haze, muted earth tones, dusky greens, rose pink accents, and an old-master varnished texture. Vertical portrait composition, intimate full-body framing, elegant anatomy, serene classical mood, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
promptZh: 创作一幅威廉·阿道夫·布格罗 (William-Adolphe Bouguereau) 风格的浪漫主义学院派油画肖像，并融入微妙的现代元素：一位年轻女性，留着 长款波浪形淡粉色头发，侧身坐在林间浅溪旁长满青苔的岩石上，赤脚触碰着溪水。她穿着 一件半透明的奶油色与淡粉色希腊罗马式雪纺连衣裙，配有绳索腰带，面料轻盈，垂坠感极佳，单肩设计展现出古典的褶皱与光泽感。添加 黑色长方形眼镜以及由粉色小野花和绿叶编织而成的花冠，将现代知识分子的气质与神话中宁芙的唯美形成对比。她呈四分之三背影姿态，单膝抬起，一只手撑在身后的岩石上，另一只手自然垂放在腿边，转头回眸看向观者，表情宁静而略带忧郁。将她置于一片迷人的森林空地中，画面包含一条溪流、一块长满青苔的巨石作为座椅、两侧茂密的深绿色植被、水边的粉色小野花，以及背景中透过树木洒下的温暖金色阳光。采用柔和写实主义，理想化的皮肤质感，细腻的笔触，头发和肩部带有发光的轮廓光，营造大气朦胧感，色调以柔和的大地色、暗绿色为主，点缀玫瑰粉色，并呈现出古典大师油画的清漆质感。竖构图肖像，亲密的全身取景，优雅的人体结构，宁静的古典氛围，无文字，无水印，无其他人物。
